groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem layers downsampling the high-res input image to 56x56 prior to dense block propagation.

groups.name: Dense Block 1
groups.description: Densely connected block: 6 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels grow to 256.

groups.name: Transition Block 1
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 256 to 128 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 2
groups.description: Densely connected block: 12 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels grow to 512.

groups.name: Transition Block 2
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 512 to 256 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 3
groups.description: Densely connected block: 48 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels grow to 1792.

groups.name: Transition Block 3
groups.description: Compresses channel volume from 1792 to 896 and downsamples spatial grid by 50%.

groups.name: Dense Block 4
groups.description: Densely connected block: 32 layers with growth rate k=32. Channels grow to 1920.

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: Global average pooling averaging spatial channels, followed by predictions.
